overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a walk through rolling grassland prairie. The player approaches a large oak tree while a horse-drawn carriage passes by, continues past a wooden signpost, and moves into open wilderness with rocky hills in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with scattered oak tree

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two horses passes from right to left across the field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the large oak tree in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving leftward across the prairie, driven by a figure in dark clothing

entered.detail: massive spreading oak tree with dense green canopy, central focal point of the landscape
tall green prairie grass swaying slightly, covering rolling terrain
rolling hills with rocky outcrops visible on the horizon under cloudy sky
low shrubs and vegetation scattered across the grassland

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide prairie grassland under a partly cloudy afternoon sky. The camera walks forward through tall grass toward a prominent oak tree in the distance. At approximately 11.5 seconds, a horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the field, the only traffic in the otherwise empty landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie approach to large oak tree with wooden signpost

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the oak tree, passing a wooden signpost on the left

notable_agents.action: horse standing tethered near the base of the oak tree, saddled and waiting

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with multiple directional signs pointing to various locations
saddled horse standing in the shade of the oak tree

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward, approaching the large oak tree which shifts from center to the right side of the frame. A wooden signpost with directional arrows becomes visible on the left. As the camera nears the tree, a saddled horse can be seen standing in the shade beneath the branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland passing the oak tree landmark

events.description: passes the oak tree, transitioning from tree-shaded area to open sunlit prairie

agents.ego_description: walking past the oak tree and continuing into the open grassland beyond

entered.detail: large boulder formation visible in the middle distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the oak tree on the right, leaving the signpost and horse behind. The scene transitions to open grassland with scattered bushes and large rock outcrops visible in the middle distance. The tree recedes into the background as the camera continues forward into the wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with visible dirt trail

agents.ego_description: walking along a faint dirt trail through the open grassland toward distant hills

entered.detail: worn dirt path cutting through the grass, leading toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows open prairie grassland with a visible dirt trail winding through the center. The camera follows the path toward distant rocky hills under a partly cloudy sky. The large rock outcrop seen earlier recedes to the left as the landscape opens up completely.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a wide prairie grassland that gradually opens into a vast wilderness of rocky hills. It begins by walking through tall grass under a partly cloudy afternoon sky, as a horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left across the empty field. As the camera approaches a prominent oak tree, the view shifts to reveal a wooden signpost on the left and a saddled horse resting in the shade beneath the branches. The scene then expands as the camera passes the tree and signpost, leaving the sheltered area behind to enter an open landscape dotted with scattered bushes and large rock outcrops. Finally, the camera follows a winding dirt trail that leads deeper into the wilderness, with the rocky outcrops receding to the left as the horizon opens up toward distant hills.
